name: Clear Divided Bin with Drawer - Brightroom™
description:
Transform your bathroom organization with this Clear Divided Bin with Drawer from Brightroom™. The plastic bin has a rectangular two-tier silhouette and boasts a transparent construction for better visibility, identification, and maintaining a neat appearance on your vanity counter or shelf. It features an open-top design with a divider for neat sorting of toiletries and cosmetics, and a bottom drawer with a cut-out pull for additional storage space for your essentials with easy access.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
